original_image_tags: A scan of a white document page, appearing mostly blank. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. A faint, illegible, and reversed blue stamp or text is visible near the top center. At the bottom center, a clear, blue ink stamp is printed upside down. The stamp text is transcribed above. There are some brown stains in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: An upside-down blue ink stamp located near the bottom of the page. The stamp contains the following text: 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'F B I', 'RECEIVED', 'OCT 8 3:40 PM '56', and 'MR. JONES'. There are also some faint, partially visible handwritten annotations or numbers (e.g., '6/10') near the stamp. The rest of the page is blank with some minor marks and two hole-punch holes at the top.

judge.reason: Description A states the blue stamp is 'illegible' while Description B provides specific, different verbatim text for it, indicating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the stamp.
